message:
test(parser): bd-2d6i SELECT full syntax acceptance tests + EXCLUDE frame fix

- Add 37 parser tests for SELECT grammar coverage (bd-2d6i §12.1):
  - TableStar, expr alias, DISTINCT, VALUES, GROUP BY/HAVING
  - All 4 compound operators (UNION/ALL/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) + ordering
  - CTE NOT MATERIALIZED, explicit column names
  - Window frames: RANGE, GROUPS, EXCLUDE variants, UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING
  - FILTER clause on aggregates and window functions
  - Subquery in FROM, multi-join chain, NATURAL LEFT JOIN
  - NULLS FIRST/LAST ordering assertions
  - 12 roundtrip tests for advanced SELECT forms
- Fix EXCLUDE CURRENT ROW parser bug: tokens were not consumed after
  EXCLUDE keyword (fell through .or() fallback without advancing)
- Parser tests: 141 → 218 (zero failures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
